overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a rural landscape. He approaches and passes a wooden hut before continuing through forested terrain with fences and rocky outcrops under overcast, misty skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural meadow path approaching wooden hut

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through an open meadow toward a distant wooden hut

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grass
hazy mountains visible in the far background
group of tall pine trees lining the path
tall green grass fields on both sides of the trail
traditional wooden hut with thatched roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through an open grassy meadow with scattered pine trees. A wooden hut sits ahead in the distance while mountains loom in the far background under an overcast sky.

events.description: passing the wooden hut on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the wooden hut, moving along the path as it curves slightly around the structure

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence appearing along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads directly past the weathered wooden hut with a thatched roof. As Geralt passes the structure, a wooden fence becomes visible on the right side of the path, and the distant mountains disappear from view behind the trees.

events.description: character turns right onto a new section of the forest path

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns right and continues walking along the forest path, passing by the wooden fence line on the right

segments.scene_description: After turning onto a new path section, Geralt walks through denser forest with tall pine trees lining both sides. A wooden fence runs parallel to the path on the right while the terrain becomes more enclosed with thicker vegetation.

events.description: rocky outcrop appears on the right side of the path replacing the wooden fence

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues his journey along the winding forest path, navigating past rocky terrain on the right side

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The forest path winds through increasingly rugged terrain with large rocky outcrops appearing on the right side. The wooden fence ends as the trail continues deeper into the pine forest with dense undergrowth lining both sides of the dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from an open, mountainous meadow into the depths of a dense, rugged pine forest. It begins with him walking along a winding dirt path through a grassy expanse where a lone wooden hut and distant mountains are visible under an overcast sky. As he approaches and passes the weathered thatched roof of the hut, the open vista closes in and the mountains vanish behind a growing screen of trees and a roadside wooden fence. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment as the path enters a thick forest of tall pines, with the fence continuing parallel to the trail through denser vegetation. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rugged, with the fence giving way to large rocky outcrops and thick undergrowth as the path winds deeper into the woods.
